game_info.title: Jelly Jump 3D
game_info.concept:
Little jellies need you more than ever before! They keep drowning over and over again. Only you can keep them safe...

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/jelly-jump/id955327604

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Little jellies need you more than ever before! They keep drowning over and over again. Only you can keep them safe...

Jump higher, survive longer and never give up!

Collect little jelly blobs and craft new jellies out of them. Challenge your friends in this ambitious game!
game_info.description: Jelly Jump 3D is an endless arcade jumper where you control a bouncy jelly cube. Dark liquid is rising from below, and you must climb higher to survive. Platforms slide in from the sides to form new floors—time your jumps perfectly to land on top of them as they close. If you jump too late, you'll be trapped underneath! Collect glowing blobs to increase your score.
game_info.controls:
- Space / Up Arrow: Jump (Hold to jump higher)
- Left / Right Arrow: Move sideways (to collect items)
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart Game (when Game Over)
- Esc: Pause / Unpause

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player jump mechanics and physics response.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Start the game. Simulate a Space key press for 200ms. Monitor the player's vertical velocity and Y position.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player's Y position should increase, vertical velocity should become positive, and then gravity should decrease velocity until the player lands.
TEST_1.description: Verify player jump mechanics and physics response.
TEST_1.strategy: Start the game. Simulate a Space key press for 200ms. Monitor the player's vertical velocity and Y position.
TEST_1.expected: The player's Y position should increase, vertical velocity should become positive, and then gravity should decrease velocity until the player lands.

TEST_2.test_description: Test platform collision and landing logic (Safe Landing).
TEST_2.strategy_description: Wait for a platform to spawn and begin closing. Trigger a jump calculated to land the player on top of the closed platform.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player Y position should stabilize on top of the new platform height. Player 'onGround' state should become true.
TEST_2.description: Test platform collision and landing logic (Safe Landing).
TEST_2.strategy: Wait for a platform to spawn and begin closing. Trigger a jump calculated to land the player on top of the closed platform.
TEST_2.expected: Player Y position should stabilize on top of the new platform height. Player 'onGround' state should become true.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Do not jump. Let a platform close above the player. Wait for the liquid to rise.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The liquid should intersect with the player. Game phase should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE".
TEST_3.strategy: Do not jump. Let a platform close above the player. Wait for the liquid to rise.
TEST_3.expected: The liquid should intersect with the player. Game phase should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE".

TEST_4.strategy_description: Spawn a collectible at a known location. Move the player (Left/Right) to intersect with the collectible.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Score should increase. The collectible should be removed from the active entities list.
TEST_4.strategy: Spawn a collectible at a known location. Move the player (Left/Right) to intersect with the collectible.
TEST_4.expected: Score should increase. The collectible should be removed from the active entities list.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Start game, wait 1 second, press ESC. Wait 1 second, check frame count/game time. Press ESC again.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game phase should switch to PAUSED. Game time/physics shouldn't advance while paused. Game should resume after second ESC.
TEST_5.strategy: Start game, wait 1 second, press ESC. Wait 1 second, check frame count/game time. Press ESC again.
TEST_5.expected: Game phase should switch to PAUSED. Game time/physics shouldn't advance while paused. Game should resume after second ESC.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Start game. Do not move. Record Liquid Y position over multiple frames.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Liquid Y position should strictly increase over time according to the difficulty curve.

TEST_7.test_description: Stress test entity spawning and cleanup.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Run the game in fast-forward (high delta time) or automated play for extended period.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Frame rate should remain stable. Old platforms and collectibles below the liquid should be removed from memory/scene.
